questions.prompt: Pull daily close from current symbol?

choices.text: request.security(syminfo.tickerid, "D", close). Symbol + timeframe + expression. Use close[1] to avoid repaint.
Bundle in tuple: [o, h, l, c] = request.security(s, "D", [open, high, low, close]). One call, multiple values. Stay under TradingView limits.

questions.explanation: Bundle multiple values into single security call.
